ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_class" TEXT /* Class of the disease (e.g., MONDO_0002322) */,
  "disease_label" TEXT /* Label of the disease (e.g., angiodysplasia) */,
  "disease_match_property" TEXT /* Property used to match the disease (e.g., http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disease */,
  "disease_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the disease */,
  "disease_prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the disease */,
  "disease_references" TEXT /* References to external sources or publications */,
  "disease_last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date for the disease record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anatomical_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anatomical location */,
  "location_class" TEXT /* Class of the anatomical location (e.g., UBERON_0000160) */,
  "location_label" TEXT /* Label of the anatomical location (e.g., intestine) */,
  "location_match_property" TEXT /* Property used to match the anatomical location (e.g., http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the anatomical location */,
  "location_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the anatomical location */,
  "location_last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date for the anatomical location record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_anatomy_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease being mapped */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anatomical location being mapped */,
  "mapping_source" TEXT /* Source of the mapping (e.g., OBO Foundry, manual entry) */,
  "mapping_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the mapping */,
  "mapping_last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date for the mapping record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_anatomy_map_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES anatomical_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_anatomy_map_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each disease
